parsed_output.justification: Justin's claims are highly contradictory throughout the game; he claims to be the Robber, then admits multiple times to being the Werewolf (Lines 72, 85), while also accusing Mitchell of being the Werewolf. Mitchell also claims to have been the Werewolf but suggests that Justin took the role from him as the Robber, which would make Justin the current Werewolf. Given Justin's erratic behavior and repeated admissions of being the Werewolf, he is the most likely candidate for elimination to help Team Village.
